title: space_changes: body-shape not verified; null vs omit inconsistency undetected
description: Test 48 has no body_json matcher, so the wire shape of the request is never verified. space_changes sends 'maxChanges': null when None (via json! macro), while space_query_changes omits the key when None (via if-let-Some). The inconsistency is undetected because no body matcher exists. RFC 8620 §5.2 says maxChanges is UnsignedInt|null, so null is technically valid, but the inconsistency within the same file is a maintenance trap: the next contributor will copy whichever pattern they see first, and neither is clearly canonical. The fix is twofold: (1) add a body_json matcher to test 48 that asserts the expected wire shape (with or without null — pick one), and (2) standardize all *_changes methods to use the same omit-when-None pattern used by *_query_changes.
